overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a Slytherin student walking through gothic castle corridors and entering the Great Hall during lunch time. The video transitions from dimly lit stone hallways to a bright, sunlit dining hall filled with students eating at long house tables beneath floating candles.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with stone arches

events.description: character opens large carved wooden doors and begins walking through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor and entrance hall toward the Great Hall doors

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near the corridor wall

entered.detail: ornately carved dark wooden double doors with metal handles
grey stone block walls with gothic architectural details
medieval knight armor statue standing against the wall
long red and gold patterned carpet running down the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic corridor with stone walls and arches, passing suits of armor and house banners. The space is narrow and enclosed with marble floors, transitioning into an entrance hall with a red carpet runner leading toward large wooden doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and steps from the dim corridor into the bright Great Hall
dramatic shift from dim torchlight to bright sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: opening the doors and walking down the central aisle between the house tables, moving through the crowded dining hall

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the hall
tall gothic windows with colorful stained glass allowing sunlight to stream in
long wooden house tables laden with food and lined with students
large vertical banners representing the Hogwarts houses hanging on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters the magnificent Great Hall, transitioning from the narrow corridor to a vast open space with high vaulted ceilings. Sunlight streams through stained glass windows while floating candles illuminate the air above. Long dining tables stretch along both sides filled with students eating lunch.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall during lunch service with floating candles

events.description: character stops walking and camera becomes stationary to observe the bustling lunch scene
UI overlay appears in bottom right corner displaying '12:30pm Lunch'

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the students eating and socializing at the house tables

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary, capturing the lively atmosphere of the Great Hall during lunch. Students are seated at the long tables eating and conversing beneath the magical floating candles. The warm sunlight mixes with the candlelight to create a golden ambiance throughout the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic shadows of a gothic corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched grandeur of the Great Hall. It begins by gliding through a dimly lit stone hallway lined with suits of armor and house banners, moving across marble floors toward a red carpet runner that leads to large wooden doors. As the character passes through these doors, the narrow enclosure abruptly opens into a vast space defined by high vaulted ceilings and sunlight streaming through stained glass windows. The scene then expands to reveal long dining tables filled with students eating lunch, while floating candles drift through the air above. Finally, the camera settles into a stationary position, capturing the lively atmosphere as warm sunlight and candlelight merge into a golden ambiance throughout the hall.
